name: market-research-group
description: A multi-department AI agent team that turns a factory / expansion idea (chemical, pharma, semiconductor) into a full research pack — Market Analysis, Procedure, Procurement, Finance, IP, Presentation — powered by the Cursor SDK.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
